structure.app_wrapper: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden flex flex-col bg-zinc-950 text-white
structure.top_bar: h-14 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-zinc-900
structure.left_panel: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 flex flex-col bg-zinc-900
structure.center_canvas: flex-1 bg-black relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center
structure.right_panel: w-72 border-l border-zinc-800 flex flex-col bg-zinc-900 overflow-y-auto
structure.bottom_timeline: h-64 border-t border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 flex flex-col

layout.spacing: Tight padding (p-2 to p-4) to maximize workspace.
layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned text for all property panels. Canvas content centered.

components.panels: Solid background, 1px border. No glassmorphism. Crisp and technical.

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black font-semibold rounded-md transition-colors px-3 py-1.5
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white rounded-md transition-colors px-3 py-1.5
buttons.icon: p-1.5 hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center justify-center

components.inputs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm font-mono focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 outline-none w-full

timeline.track: h-8 border-b border-zinc-800/50 relative hover:bg-zinc-800/30 flex items-center
timeline.playhead: absolute top-0 bottom-0 w-px bg-cyan-500 z-10
timeline.playhead_handle: absolute top-0 -ml-1.5 w-3 h-3 bg-cyan-500 clip-polygon-playhead cursor-ew-resize
timeline.keyframe: w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-violet-500 rotate-45 cursor-pointer hover:scale-125 transition-transform absolute top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 -ml-1.25 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(139,92,246,0.6)]

canvas.background_pattern: Radial dots (zinc-800) to simulate an editor grid.
canvas.transform_handle: w-2 h-2 bg-white border border-cyan-500 absolute
canvas.pivot_point: w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 border-violet-500 absolute -ml-1.5 -mt-1.5 cursor-crosshair shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)]

motion.micro_interactions: Instant or very fast (100ms) for UI tools to feel responsive. Editor buttons should not have sluggish easing.
motion.hover_states: Hover states must strictly increase contrast (e.g., zinc-400 to white text).

image_urls.description: Sample isolated character for testing cut tool.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass AA contrast against #18181B.
accessibility.test_ids: Enforce data-testid on every timeline track, keyframe, layer item, and toolbar button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build strictly as a Single Page Editor Application using .js files (no .tsx).
The layout must be locked to 100vh with overflow-hidden on the main wrapper. Never allow the body itself to scroll.
Do not use generic Shadcn Card components for the layout panels; use flat divs with 1px border-zinc-800 to explicitly separate the Topbar, Left Panel, Canvas, Right Panel, and Timeline.
The center canvas is the hero. Use a repeating radial-gradient to create a dot matrix background.
For the Timeline, map layers dynamically to tracks. Use an absolute positioned playhead over the tracks. Keyframes should be small rotated divs (diamonds) in violet.
The right panel properties must use a dense 2-column grid for inputs (e.g., Position X and Y side-by-side) with JetBrains Mono text for numerical precision.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-image-button', data-testid='timeline-play').
Maintain strict control over 'pointer-events' in the canvas when switching between 'Select/Move' and 'Cut' modes.
